## Summary

Describe the scoring, validation, merge, export, test, or documentation change.

## Motivation

Explain the user problem and why this repository should address it.

## Behavior change

- Previous behavior:
- New behavior:
- Compatibility impact:

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated automated tests
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest -v`
- [ ] Used synthetic, non-sensitive fixtures
- [ ] Compared scoring changes with a fixed benchmark or explained why not applicable
- [ ] Confirmed JSON, CSV, and Markdown output compatibility when affected

## Configuration and schema

- [ ] Configuration changes are versioned or backward compatible
- [ ] Event-field changes include schema and migration notes
- [ ] New adapter data does not invent timestamps or signals silently

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README or relevant guide
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md for user-visible behavior
- [ ] Added maintenance trace where appropriate

## Reviewer notes

List trade-offs, known limitations, follow-up work, and any benchmark results.
